title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome Capital India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome Capital India:
FreshToHome Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
